title: Ubiquiti RocketDish 24dBi, 2,4GHz, Rocket Kit
description: Two-pole 24 dBi antenna suitable for Rocket M2 (MIMO). It uses both horizontal and vertical polarization, replacing two separate antennas to save you the cost of renting antennas. The antenna is suitable for the simple creation of PtP connections. It comes with waterproof accessories for connection to the Rocket M2 Thanks to the built-in rocket kit assembly system, it is possible to directly mount any Rocket unit on this antenna without installing any additional accessories. Simply plug in the Rocket and you're done
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,6 F/B ratio [dB] 65 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 35 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 6 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 6 Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 24 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
